sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; const reviews = [ { name: "Rahul Sharma", location: "Delhi, India", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/75.jpg", text: "Incredibly smooth booking experience. Car was immaculate and delivered exactly on time. Will book again without hesitation." }, { name: "Priya Verma", location: "Mumbai, India", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/65.jpg", text: "Affordable pricing paired with genuinely great service. The online booking process is intuitive and fast. Highly recommended." }, { name: "Aman Singh", location: "Chandigarh, India", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/32.jpg", text: "Easy system, quick booking, beautiful cars. The confirmation was instant and the admin team was super responsive." }, ]; const Reviews = () => (
Testimonials

What Our Customers Say

Trusted by drivers across India

{reviews.map((r, i) => (
{r.name}
{r.location}
★★★★★

"{r.text}"

))}
); export default Reviews;
